message:
test(sentry): add 106 unit and integration tests for sentry connector

Add comprehensive test coverage for the new fcp-sentry connector:

Unit tests (61):
- error.rs (24): is_retryable for all variants, retry_after, to_fcp_error
  conversions, Display formatting
- types.rs (20): serde roundtrips for all 11 API types (Organization,
  Project, Issue, Event, Release, Deploy, AlertRule, etc.)
- connector.rs (17): SentryConfig::from_params validation (empty/whitespace
  tokens, invalid UUIDs, both/no auth), require_str, operations_info
  completeness/uniqueness, DoctorResult state machine, risk level checks
- client.rs (3 existing): url encoding, auth debug redaction, secretless

Integration tests (45): wiremock-based tests for all 16 operations,
error paths (401/403/404/429/500), lifecycle (configure/handshake/health/
doctor/shutdown), request/error counter tracking, simulate validation

Bead: lszk.3.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-sentry"
+description = "Sentry error tracking connector for the Flywheel Connector Protocol"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+
+[lib]
+name = "fcp_sentry"
+path = "src/lib.rs"
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fcp-sentry"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-core" }
+fcp-async-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-async-core" }
+
+anyhow.workspace = true
+async-trait.workspace = true
+chrono.workspace = true
+reqwest = { workspace = true, features = ["stream"] }
+serde.workspace = true
+serde_json.workspace = true
+thiserror.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
+tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
+uuid.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+wiremock.workspace = true
+tokio = { workspace = true, features = ["macros", "rt-multi-thread"] }
+fcp-crypto = { path = "../../crates/fcp-crypto" }
+fcp-manifest = { path = "../../crates/fcp-manifest" }
+fcp-testkit = { path = "../../crates/fcp-testkit" }

@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+//! FCP Sentry Connector library.
+//!
+//! Provides the Sentry error tracking connector implementing the
+//! Flywheel Connector Protocol. Re-exported for integration tests.
+
+#![forbid(unsafe_code)]
+#![allow(dead_code)]
+#![allow(
+    clippy::cast_possible_truncation,
+    clippy::cast_precision_loss,
+    clippy::cast_sign_loss,
+    clippy::derivable_impls,
+    clippy::future_not_send,
+    clippy::manual_unwrap_or_default,
+    clippy::match_same_arms,
+    clippy::missing_errors_doc,
+    clippy::missing_fields_in_debug,
+    clippy::must_use_candidate,
+    clippy::option_if_let_else,
+    clippy::or_fun_call,
+    clippy::redundant_closure_for_method_calls,
+    clippy::struct_field_names,
+    clippy::too_many_arguments,
+    clippy::too_many_lines,
+    clippy::trivially_copy_pass_by_ref,
+    clippy::unreadable_literal,
+    clippy::unused_async
+)]
+
+pub mod client;
+pub mod connector;
+pub mod error;
+pub mod types;
